description: Upgrade header in HTTP/1.0 request must be ignored
rawRequest:
GET / HTTP/1.0
Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Connection: Upgrade
Upgrade: websocket
Sec-WebSocket-Key: dGhlIHNhbXBsZSBub25jZQ==
Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13
rawResponse:
HTTP/1.0 200 OK
x-powered-by: Dart with package:shelf
date: <DATE>
content-length: 2
x-frame-options: SAMEORIGIN
content-type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
x-xss-protection: 1; mode=block
x-content-type-options: nosniff

OK

description: WebSocket upgrade via POST must not be accepted
rawRequest:

Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Connection: Upgrade
Upgrade: websocket
Sec-WebSocket-Key: dGhlIHNhbXBsZSBub25jZQ==
Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13
rawResponse:

date: <DATE>
x-frame-options: SAMEORIGIN
content-type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
x-xss-protection: 1; mode=block
x-content-type-options: nosniff

0

description: Upgrade to unknown protocol must not return 101
rawRequest:

rawResponse:
